chunks.text: Page 1 of 2 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D— 467 of 2021 Date order with Signature of Hon’ble Judge Application in disposed of case For hearing of CMA No.678/2024 (151 CPC) 02.05.2024 Mr. Abdul Naeem Pirzada, Advocate for the petitioners Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General Sindh >>>>>..<<<<< Muhammad Iqbal Kalhoro, J;- Petitioners claiming to be employees of Town Committee, Mehrabpur, filed this petition seeking directions to respondents to release salaries to them. On 28.11.2023, finding the dispute between parties rooted in factual controversy, the issue was referred to District Accounts Officer, Naushahro Feroze to examine the relevant record of Town Committee, Mehrabpur for determining salaries of all the petitioners and forwarding such report to the Chairman, Town Committee Mehrabpur for implementation in accordance with law, and the petition was accordingly disposed. 2. In compliance, the District Accounts Officer, Naushahro Feroze has filed report dated 14.03.2024, stating mainly that no record regarding appointment of the petitioners was provided to him, although repeatedly asked from the officials concerned of Town Committee, Mehrabpur. According to him a report was called from Resident Audit Officer, Local Fund Fund Audit, Naushahro Feroze, who through an official letter has revealed that no record Page 2 of 2 regarding employees of the Town Committee, Mehrabpur is available with him. 3. Confronted with this report, learned counsel for the petitioners has not been able to cite any reason for not forwarding the relevant record of petitioners’ appointments to the District Accounts Officer, Naushahro Feroze for compliance of the orders as above.

According to him a report was called from Resident Audit Officer, Local Fund Fund Audit, Naushahro Feroze, who through an official letter has revealed that no record Page 2 of 2 regarding employees of the Town Committee, Mehrabpur is available with him. 3. Confronted with this report, learned counsel for the petitioners has not been able to cite any reason for not forwarding the relevant record of petitioners’ appointments to the District Accounts Officer, Naushahro Feroze for compliance of the orders as above. We have asked him to submit such record before this Court for scrutiny but he has stated that the record is not available with him. We have also asked him to produce the original appointment orders of the petitioners, advertisement in response to which they had applied and were appointed, but to no avail. We therefore, are suspicious of credibility of petitioners’ appointment in Town Committee, Mehrabpur, and are of the view that the listed application merits no consideration, and is accordingly dismissed. Judge Judge ARBROHI
